## Add a SiliconBeest instance

Thank you for contributing to the SiliconBeest instance directory.

### Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated exactly one entry in `instance.json`.
- [ ] The instance is reachable over HTTPS and runs SiliconBeest.
- [ ] The domain and status are accurate.
- [ ] `url` exposes `/api/v2/instance`, or `uri` points directly to that endpoint on the same domain.
- [ ] The instance API returns one of the supported registration modes: `open`, `approval`, `referral`, or `closed`.
- [ ] The instance API returns the intended public `description`, `languages`, `source_url`, and `thumbnail.url`.
- [ ] I did not include private contact information, secrets, analytics, or user counts.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm validate:instances` locally.
- [ ] I understand that maintainers may verify the public instance API before merging.

### Instance

- Domain:
- Operator or maintainer:
- Why should this instance be listed?
- Public API endpoint used for verification:

### Notes

Describe any development-only status, planned maintenance, or other information reviewers should know.
